title: Michael's Materials
description: A material adding mod for Fabric 1.17 with the idea to port to 1.18 on release.
body:
A material adding mod for Fabric 1.17 with the idea to port to 1.18 on release.

This mod adds the following:

- Tin, Lead, Silver, Platinum and Titanium (with Ore, Raw Ore, Ingot, Dust, Nugget, Block and Raw Block variants)
- Coal, Copper, Iron, Gold, Silver, Lapis, Emerald, Diamond, Netherite Dust
- Copper Nuggets
- Charcoal and Coal Nuggets (smelts single item)
- Mortar and Reinforced Mortar (grinding to dusts)
- Ore generation
 

 

Trello:

https://trello.com/b/xXLiGm1z/materials
